tool_args.hypothesis: approve lacks proper owner/approved check allowing anyone to set approval for any token, enabling token theft via transferFrom.

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "approve", "hypothesis": "approve lacks proper owner/approved check allowing anyone to set approval for any token, enabling token theft via transferFrom."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call approve(tokenId) from attacker address to set themselves as approved for a target tokenId owned by victim, then call transferFrom(victim, attacker, tokenId) to transfer the token.
